textByHash.63615de767ebb077004f450b14082bedf7759160: Welcome! You can buy fishing equipment at my store. We'll also buy anything you catch off you.
textByHash.81fa0ba98f5d71b402bf35a8150192f572dfd98a: Aha! Here it is! Take this slime, mix it with some Harralander and water and you'll have the Blamish Oil you need for treating your fishing rod.
textByHash.8bf4b8b9132bd8a0912c79c0af0d945448215447: You'll need a lava-proof fishing line. I'm sure I already gave you what you need for this - take an ordinary fishing rod, and then cover it with the fire-proof Blamish Oil.
textByHash.ea36706e48eccef4eb6faca2f2dfd32d7c5a40be: You know... thinking about it... I may have a jar of Blamish Slime around here somewhere... Now where did I put it?
textByHash.f42d4430b583c2e6fbc668305eb90a4953855512: Lava eels eh? That's a tricky one that is, you'll need a lava-proof fishing line. The method for making this would be to take an ordinary fishing rod, and then cover it with the fire-proof Blamish Oil.
